errors.description: Evidence record chain is missing, malformed, or does not bind to the sealed archive.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime renewal planning is denied until evidence record continuity is verified.

errors.description: Sealed audit archive is missing, malformed, or has an invalid root hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime renewal planning is denied until sealed archive integrity is verified.

errors.description: WORM immutable storage manifest is missing, malformed, or not bound to the archive chain.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime renewal planning is denied until immutable storage readiness is verified.

errors.description: TSA live verification metadata is missing, malformed, stale, or not bound to the timestamp token.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime renewal planning is denied until timestamp metadata is verified.

errors.description: Regulator export profile is missing, malformed, or not bound to the evidence set.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime renewal planning is denied until regulator export profile readiness is verified.

errors.description: Renewal runtime entries are reordered, malformed, or break append-only continuity.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime renewal planning is denied until append-only order is proven.

errors.description: A duplicate renewal runtime identifier was detected.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime renewal planning is denied to prevent replayed renewal records.

errors.description: Policy decision metadata is missing, malformed, stale, or not bound to the runtime record.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime renewal planning is denied until fresh governance approval metadata is verified.

errors.description: Runtime output path is mutable or not the local-only hash URI.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime renewal planning is denied because mutable runtime paths could imply execution.

errors.description: Raw governance payload, OCSP/CRL bytes, runtime artifact, or sensitive material marker was detected.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime renewal planning is denied until exported diagnostics are hash-only.

errors.description: Diagnostics include unsafe unredacted fields or secret-like markers.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime renewal planning is denied until diagnostics are redacted.
